sub_pixel_system.notes: Not a movement-focused game; board game with turn-based puzzle gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Token Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player tokens move on board based on die roll (counts down from 6 to 0). Feature Squares at level 3+ cause token to fly around board until button pressed. Drop-Out Squares at level 4 cause token to fall back to level 3 corresponding position.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Anticipation is a board game/puzzle game hybrid with no traditional platformer movement mechanics. Player control is limited to button buzzing and spelling answers. No documented jump physics, gravity, or sub-pixel movement systems exist for this title as it does not feature continuous character movement.
